2026-0322
2026-04-09GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityTreaty on Extradition between Canada and the Czech Republic Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Treaty on Extradition between Canada and the Czech Republic.N/A
subject: Treaty on Extradition between Canada and the Czech Republic
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Treaty on Extradition between Canada and the Czech Republic.
